productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Red Wallets
description: The stitch detailing on this cute red purse gives a little nod to quilted Chanel bags – the epitome of great fashion style.  This is a very sophisticated choice for the discerning fashion lover.Made of 100% polyurethane on the outside with a hexagon stitch design, and 100% polyester liningExternal zipper fastening around three sidesThree open and one zippered internal compartmentsMetallic logo on frontCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
